conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 56)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 56. THREE U.S. CARRIERS NOW IN CENTCOM (Lincoln + Ford + Bush) — first time since Operation Iraqi Freedom in 2003; combined >200 aircraft, 15,000 sailors/Marines, 9+ DDGs. Iran ceasefire INDEFINITE (Trump Apr 21) — holding 17 days. Iran FM Araghchi flew to Islamabad Apr 24; Witkoff/Kushner depart for Pakistan Apr 25 for direct US-Iran talks. Lebanon ceasefire EXTENDED 3 weeks (Trump-brokered Apr 23) but mutual violations confirmed: 2,491 Lebanese killed (+37 vs Apr 21) / 7,719 wounded. U.S. blockade redirects 34 vessels (CENTCOM Apr 24). NYT (Apr 24): U.S. expended >1,200 Patriots, ~1,100 stealth cruise missiles, >1,000 Tomahawks (~10x annual procurement). S&P 500 record close 7,165.08 (+0.80%); Nasdaq record 24,836.60 (+1.63%); Brent $105.33; WTI $94.40; AAA gas $4.022. UMich final April sentiment 49.8 — lowest on record. Cumulative U.S. cost midpoint ~$51B (range $25B-$95B). 60-day War Powers deadline ~May 1.

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
